metadata.title: ClipProfit - Creator Campaign Marketplace
metadata.description: Connect casino businesses with social media creators for view-based ad campaigns.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.passwordUpdated: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
signIn.callbackFailed: We could not finish signing you in. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.success: Check your email - we sent a password reset link.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.checkEmailBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account and get started.

email.subject: Confirm your ClipProfit account
email.title: Confirm your account
email.body: Click the button below to verify your email and activate your ClipProfit account.
email.footer: This link expires in 15 minutes. If you did not create a ClipProfit account, you can ignore this email.

confirm.title: Confirm your account
confirm.body: Click the button below to verify your email and activate your ClipProfit account.
confirm.invalidBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

reset.title: Set new password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

api.rateLimited: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
api.alreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.

page.panelTitle: Almost there. Let's set up your account.
page.panelDescription: Just one step before you can start browsing campaigns and tracking earnings.
page.title: Welcome to ClipProfit
page.description: Just a few quick questions to get you started.

form.sourceQuestion: Where did you hear about us?
form.nicheQuestion: What niche(s) do you create content for?
form.completeBody: Two more things unlock your first payout: connecting a social account and joining a campaign. Pick one to start.
form.skip: Skip for now - go to campaigns

legal.englishOnlyNotice: These legal documents are currently available in English only.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.description: You don't have permission to view this page.
